nightwood.label: Nightwood
nightwood.description: Nightwood sits beneath heavy boughs and old authority. Use the concept art as the location preview, then assign a separate top-down local map here once it is uploaded.
nightwood.previewDescription: Nightwood is a layered settlement entry. The first click should show your concept art and atmosphere text. The Enter Location button should then lead into a top-down local map once you assign locations.nightwood.mapImage.
nightwood.scaleLabel: Local town scale. Travel miles are paused here.

poiMarkers.label: Clan Quarters
poiMarkers.description: The clan quarters serve as Nightwood’s political heart. Visiting here lets the party meet household officials, clan envoys, guards, and petitioners.
notes: Good place to deliver messages or secure clan favour hooks.
A failed social scene here can ripple into later settlement politics.

poiMarkers.label: Temple of Telluria
poiMarkers.description: A rooted stone temple dedicated to Telluria. Priests here oversee blessings, memorials, and rites tied to land, duty, and endurance.
services: Ask about omens or sacred ground
notes: Ideal lore-delivery point for temple politics and divine favour.

poiMarkers.label: The Black Briar Inn
poiMarkers.description: A warm inn where scouts, merchants, and wardens share news over food and strong drink.
notes: Easy place to drop regional rumours or wilderness hooks.

poiMarkers.label: Ironroot Smithy
poiMarkers.description: A heavy timber smithy that supplies tools, tack, repair work, and rugged frontier arms.
notes: Useful for downtime costs, kit repair, and bespoke commissions.

encounters.label: Gate Dispute
encounters.description: A tense confrontation at Nightwood’s gate threatens to spill into violence.

encounters.label: Temple Grounds Ambush
encounters.description: Something hostile moves through sacred ground near the Temple of Telluria.

road_bandits.description: Bandits spring from cover along a lonely road.

wild_wolves.name: Hungry Wolves
wild_wolves.description: A pack circles the party in the wilds.

town_guard_skirmish.name: Town Guard Skirmish

rootbound_ambush.name: Rootbound Ambush

dockside_cutthroats.name: Dockside Cutthroats
dockside_cutthroats.description: A fast urban encounter for alleys, quays, tavern yards, or market spillways.
